title: Voylla Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Voylla Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Voylla Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Voylla Ventures Solutions:
Voylla Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla Ventures Solutions!
